Clear Vision for Richmond

Onyx Optometrist provides personalized eye care in Richmond, VA. Our experienced team helps you see your best in every season.

★★★★★ 6+ Verified Reviews
Schedule a Visit → Meet the Team →
What We Do

Our Services

Professional optometrist solutions tailored to your needs.

Comprehensive Eye Exams

Thorough vision assessments tailored to Richmond's diverse population.

Learn More →

Contact Lens Fitting

Expert fittings for Richmond's active lifestyles and seasonal conditions.

Learn More →

Dry Eye Treatment

Specialized relief for Richmond's climate-induced dry eye symptoms.

Learn More →

Pediatric Eye Care

Gentle, thorough vision care for Richmond's youngest residents.

Learn More →

Emergency Eye Care

Prompt treatment for urgent eye issues in the Richmond area.

Learn More →
Flexible Options

Financing That Works With Your Goals

We believe every customer deserves access to top-quality optometrist services. That's why we offer flexible options to fit any budget. No stress, no surprises — just a clear path forward.

  • Low monthly payments
  • Quick approval process
  • No hidden fees

Certified Professionals

Satisfaction Guaranteed

Industry-leading warranty coverage

Reviews

Trusted By Our Community

After years of discomfort during Richmond's allergy seasons, Dr. Chen diagnosed my meibomian gland dysfunction. The in-office treatments and home care plan have made gardening in my Church Hill yard enjoyable again. The staff even recommended specific sunglasses for Virginia's bright winters.

Marcus T.
★★★★★

My third grader was struggling in school until Onyx Optometrist discovered her convergence insufficiency. Their child-friendly approach made the exam stress-free, and the vision therapy exercises incorporated VCU basketball themes to keep her engaged. Her grades have improved dramatically.

Eleanor W.
★★★★★

When I got sawdust in my eye during a Fan District home renovation, they saw me within an hour. The doctor removed the particle gently and provided detailed instructions for caring for my eye in Richmond's humid recovery conditions. Truly saved my weekend project.

Devon P.
★★★★★

As a marathon runner training along the James River, I needed contacts that could handle sweat and pollen. The team at Onyx found lenses that stay comfortable through long runs and educated me on proper cleaning for Virginia's water quality. Game changer for my training.

Lisa M.
★★★★★

Moving from New York to Richmond, I didn't realize how much the climate would affect my eyes. The thorough exam caught early signs of dryness, and their recommendations for humidifier settings in my Scotts Addition loft have made all the difference. Appreciate the local expertise.

Rajesh K.
★★★★★

The optician helped me choose frames that complement both my face shape and my professional needs at the Virginia Museum of Fine Arts. They considered the lighting in our galleries and selected durable materials that withstand frequent handling during tours. Perfect blend of form and function.

Tasha B.
★★★★★
Read All Reviews →
How It Works

We'll Guide You Through!

From first call to final walkthrough, here's what to expect.

01

Contact Our Team

Reach out by phone or through our online form. We'll schedule a time that works best for you.

02

Assessment

Our team will thoroughly assess your needs and discuss the best options for your care.

03

We Get to Work

Our experienced team handles everything with precision and care, ensuring your comfort throughout.

04

Follow-Up

We follow up to ensure your complete satisfaction and answer any questions about your ongoing care.

Who We Are

A Local Business For Your Local Community

Onyx Optometrist is proud to serve our neighbors with honest, quality service. We're not just an optometry company — we're your community partner dedicated to delivering excellence. {isMedical ? Our Promise

Why Choose Onyx Optometrist

Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest standards for every patient — no shortcuts, no compromises.

Community

We're your neighbors first. Every patient we help strengthens the community we call home.

Integrity

Honest pricing, transparent communication, and doing what we say we'll do — every single time.

FAQ

Your Questions, Our Expert Advice

How often should Richmond residents get eye exams?
We recommend annual exams due to our region's high pollen counts and humidity fluctuations that affect eye health. Computer users in Richmond's growing tech sector may need more frequent checkups.
Do you test for glaucoma common in African American patients?
Yes, we perform comprehensive glaucoma screening important for Richmond's diverse population, including specialized testing for higher-risk groups.

Excellence. Community. Integrity.
That's Onyx Optometrist.

Ready to get started? Fill out the form and our team will be in touch within 24 hours.
